common.apiBaseUrlDescription: Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:4317. It can also be configured with VITE_PRIVATE_TOOLBOX_API_URL.
common.toolInfoDescription: These tools call the Private Toolbox local API. Start the API server before using them.

rdap.title: RDAP lookup
rdap.description: Lookup RDAP registration data for a public IP address or domain.
rdap.shortDescription: Lookup domain or IP registration data

dns.title: DNS lookup
dns.description: Resolve DNS records for a hostname.
dns.name: Hostname

ssl.title: SSL certificate inspect
ssl.description: Inspect the TLS certificate for a public host.

ipCurrent.title: Current public IP
ipCurrent.description: Query IPPure current outbound IP card data.

ipLookup.title: IP information lookup
ipLookup.description: Lookup public IP information through the IPPure search flow.

cidrCalculator.title: CIDR Calculator
cidrCalculator.description: Calculate IPv4 network ranges, subnet masks, wildcard masks, and usable host counts.

httpRequest.title: HTTP request
httpRequest.description: Send an HTTP request through the local backend.
httpRequest.shortDescription: Send HTTP requests from the local API

httpStatus.title: HTTP status
httpStatus.description: Check a URL's HTTP status, redirects, and response headers through the local backend.
